combined_public_hearing_and_board_meetin.reason: Document header contains a five-digit typo year ('JANUARY 11, 20211'). Letterhead corroborates 2022: Antonio Reynoso introduced as the NEW Brooklyn Borough President (took office Jan 2022), Lincoln Restler listed as councilmember (seated 2022). Jan 11 was a Tuesday in 2022, a Monday in 2021, and Jan 2021's meeting (cb1-2021-01-12) already exists.

Combined_Public_Hearing_Board_Meeting_Mi.reason: Dirty embedded OCR mangles the September header date beyond parsing; first parseable page-1 date is an October reference, causing a collision with the real 10/9/18 file and a silent drop. Filename date is corroborated by the meeting-cadence gap at Sept 2018.

Special-Full-Board-Minutes-6-12-23.pdf.reason: Content identify resolved to 2023-06-13 (the next night's combined meeting, referenced in the text), colliding with the combined minutes and silently dropping this special meeting. Filename date 6-12-23 is authoritative.
